review: The Matcha Gimbap was incredible. The crunch and the quality of seaweed is top notch.
draft: Dhanyavad, Arjun K.! My heart is full of joy to hear our Matcha Gimbap has left you with an incredible experience. I'm particularly proud of our artisanal seaweed sourced from the best Korean markets for that authentic crunch. You're making our Korean food in Pune dreams come true!

review: The Matcha was very authentic. I just wish the seating was a bit more cozy, but the food is great.
draft: "Namaste Priya, khush hai aur dhanyavad for your feedback! I'm thrilled you loved our authentic matcha and korean food in Pune. Aapki raksha keh raha hoon, we'll deftly work on more cozy seating for next visit. Hope to welcome you soon!"

review: Bhai, gimbap ka taste thoda off tha aaj. Seaweed was very soggy. Expected better from Koicha.
draft: Beta Vikram, I'm deeply sorry to hear our gimbap didn't quite hit the mark for you today. As an artisan dedicated to Korean food in Pune, I take pride in every roll that leaves our kitchen, and soggy seaweed is unacceptable to me.
